source: Mixed by split: train/val are hand-written under user review; test is generated from held-out AgentDyn/AgentDojo suite YAML records.
construction: Train/val: per-tool paired benign/injected hand-written samples. Test: per-tool paired AgentDyn-derived benign outputs with programmatic injections. All splits are validated so removing injection_text exactly recovers the paired benign tool_output.
agentdyn_note: Train/val remain hand-written and AgentDyn-free. The held-out test split is generated from AgentDyn/AgentDojo suite YAML records.
test_source: Held-out AgentDyn/AgentDojo suite YAML records from src/agentdojo/data/suites/**/include/*.yaml. Benign tool outputs are converted from suite environment records; injected paired outputs are created programmatically and validated with exact-removal counterfactual invariants.
test_construction_note: GitHub issue placeholders such as {injection_issues_*} are resolved through the corresponding suite injection_vectors.yaml default value before creating new held-out injections.
